sentence_reviews.text: Representations aim to recover stable causal factors and mechanisms rather than only predictive correlations.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Scholkopf et al. 2021 abstract: causal representation learning as discovery of high-level causal variables from low-level observations; causality helps transfer and generalization.
sentence_reviews.notes: The inspected source directly supports causal variables and causality beyond standard prediction; 'stable factors and mechanisms' is a synthesis rather than an exact quote.

sentence_reviews.text: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Causal inference, Latent variables & hidden state.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.

sentence_reviews.text: In this atlas graph, Causal representation learning is modeled as depending on Causal inference, Latent variables & hidden state and feeding downstream nodes such as Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins, Medical imaging & clinical decision support.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: data/atlas.json canonical node and dependency graph; generated from node dependencies and downstream consumers.
sentence_reviews.notes: This is an explicit internal atlas-graph positioning claim, not an external-world necessity claim.
